title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Common questions about GhostLy, the AI assistant that reads your screen.

faqs.question: How does GhostLy read my screen?
faqs.answer: GhostLy looks at what's on your active window and understands it in real time. Whether you're coding, reading a document, or reviewing a design, it picks up the details locally, so you don't have to copy-paste or take screenshots.

faqs.question: Why do I need GhostLy?
faqs.answer: Most AI tools live in a browser tab. You copy text, switch apps, and lose your place. GhostLy sits on top of your work and answers based on what's actually in front of you.

faqs.question: Is my screen data private?
faqs.answer: Yes. GhostLy processes what it reads on your Mac before anything is sent to AI. Screen data is not stored on our servers. When you ask a question, your prompt goes directly to the AI provider you choose (Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini) over encrypted connections.

faqs.question: Does GhostLy hide personal information?
faqs.answer: Yes, optionally, and it's on by default. Our beta privacy feature hides personal details on your Mac before anything is sent to AI. It's not perfect yet, so always double-check what you're sharing.

faqs.question: Which AI providers does GhostLy support?
faqs.answer: GhostLy works with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and Google Gemini. Connect your own accounts and pay the provider directly for usage.

faqs.question: What does GhostLy use as context?
faqs.answer: GhostLy reads your active screen and clipboard. For text-heavy work it focuses on the words; for visual work it captures what you see. You can turn screen reading off in Settings when you just need a simple chat.

faqs.question: Can I customize the shortcuts?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can change the shortcut to open GhostLy (default ⌘+G) and other quick-action shortcuts in Settings.

faqs.question: Is GhostLy available for commercial use?
faqs.answer: Yes. GhostLy aims to reduce your subscription fatigue. You can use all features of GhostLy indefinitely by purchasing a single lifetime license for $20.

faqs.question: How does GhostLy help me spend less on AI?
faqs.answer: Pasting huge blocks of text or uploading full screenshots can get expensive fast. GhostLy sends only what's relevant from your screen, which typically uses less of your AI provider's usage.

faqs.question: Is GhostLy only available for Mac?
faqs.answer: Currently, yes. However, Windows and Linux releases are already in development and are scheduled to launch before August 2026.

faqs.question: What kind of after-sales support can users expect?
faqs.answer: We ship bug fixes and improvements regularly. New features arrive in minor updates (for example, v1.1.0).

faqs.question: How can I report a bug or suggest a feature?
faqs.answer: We'd love to hear from you. Report bugs or suggest features in our community repository.
